derived_from.note: This standard keeps the existing thickness-based wall resolver intact and only normalizes the external construction catalog format.

catalog_row_standard.note: The catalog stays row-based so wall_logic can keep using the current grouping and thickness accumulation pattern.

idf_object_reference.note: The bundle and rebuilt IDF currently support up to six layers, matching CONSTRUCTION_LAYER_FIELDS in wall_logic and bundle_writer.

resolver_relevant_metadata.note: Current values are wall, opening, and reference.
Current active values are Wall, Floor, Door, Window, and GlassDoor.
Current runtime normalizes boundary families to Outdoors or Surface.
Used for interzone wall and opening reverse naming without changing the existing writer or rebuild logic.
Marks non-wall library rows that bundle_writer should always preload before dynamic wall additions.
Currently used only to auto-create reverse rows for wall constructions.
Allowed for future layer overrides but unused by the current shipped constructions.
